intentSynonyms: create an inline comment in confluence
add an inline comment in confluence
make a new inline comment in confluence
open a new inline comment in confluence
description: Create an inline comment on specific text in a Confluence page. The comment is anchored to the selected text and appears as a margin note. Provide the exact text to anchor to, the total number of matches of that text on the page, and which match (0-based index) to anchor to.

page_id.description: Page ID to create the inline comment on

body.description:
Comment body in storage format (HTML) — e.g., "

This needs clarification

"

text_selection.description: The exact text in the page to anchor the comment to

text_selection_match_count.description: Total number of times the selected text appears on the page

text_selection_match_index.description: Which occurrence of the text to anchor to (0-based index)
